tasks.label: git add commit push
tasks.command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && git add . && git commit -m "${input:commitMessage}" && git push

tasks.label: front end deploy
tasks.command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && npx opennextjs-cloudflare build && wrangler deploy

tasks.label: front end dev
tasks.command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && npm run dev

tasks.label: back end deploy
tasks.command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && wrangler deploy

tasks.label: back end dev
tasks.command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && wrangler tail
